title: Sorting Array of Integers with Incorrect Sort Order

statement.markdown:
Implement a function to sort an array of integers in ascending order using bubble sort. The function should take an array of integers as input, sort it, and return the sorted array. Note that the input array is not guaranteed to be sorted, and its size can be up to 10,000 elements.

The function should return a new sorted array and leave the input array unchanged.
statement.inputFormat: The function takes one input parameter: an array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: The function returns a new array of integers sorted in ascending order.
statement.notes:
The input array is not guaranteed to be sorted, and its size can be up to 10,000 elements.

Hint: Use a loop to compare adjacent elements in the array and swap them if they are in the wrong order.

examples.explanation: The input array is sorted in ascending order.
